subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The net equivalent energy usage of a building, calculated in accordance with (a), must not exceed the allowance calculated in accordance with (b)—

ol.li:
(A× E E )+ E P + E S − E R MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr A MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyqaaaa@36BA@ R0lGODlhEAARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAARAAACH4SPqcvtGN4JUcb6rjW41b5QotOBSemd4QiI pgTHSgEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHJBQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEF VGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WP RC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/ SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINBAAAAACH/C01h dGhUeXBlMDAzwTw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1 QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1h dGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtaT5BPC9taT48 L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGAgAAAAAAADs== the floor area factor obtained by multiplying the total floor area of the building by the adjustment factor in Table 13.6.2a; and
E E MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGfbaabeaaaaa@37B4@ R0lGODlhFQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAYAAACL4SPqcvtD6NUodow8dGRA+9w4CNO35VtZpki 2jWC3pvAlvuZxr3mOp3h6YbEIqQAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx2gUBAAcERFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxC YXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEE TVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F 9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAA CgEAAgCDRQADABsAAAsBAAIAg0UAAAEBAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz5Tw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249 IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50 ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMu b3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT5FPC9taT48bWk+RTwvbWk+PC9t c3ViPjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUw MDIGCAAAAAAAADs== the main space conditioning and main water heater efficiency factor obtained from the ABCB Standard for Whole-of-Home Efficiency Factors; and
E P MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGqbaabeaaaaa@37BF@ R0lGODlhFQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAYAAACLoSPqcvtD6NUodow8dGRA+9w4CNO35VtZpki YrWA8pdcqEqvsJnzY7fjCYfESAEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHaBQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJh c2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRN VCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0 Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAK AQACAINFAAMAGwAACwEAAgCDUAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDPlPD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0i MS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRk bEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5v cmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtaT5QPC9taT48L21z dWI+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAw MgYIAAAAAAAAOw=== the swimming pool pump energy usage in (2); and
E S MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGtbaabeaaaaa@37C2@ R0lGODlhFQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAYAAACLYSPqcvtD6NUodow8dGRA+9w4CNO35VtZpki 5fgl73ihBixVpryqmbULCoeSAgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMdoFAQAHBERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFz aWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1U IEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQq X0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoB AAIAg0UAAwAbAAALAQACAINTAAABAQAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM+U8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIx LjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRs QE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9y Zy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWk+RTwvbWk+PG1pPlM8L21pPjwvbXN1 Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAy BggAAAAAAAA7= the spa pump energy usage in (3); and
E R MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGsbaabeaaaaa@37C1@ R0lGODlhFQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAYAAACMISPqcvtD6NUodow8dGRA+9w4CNO35VtZpki YrWA8pdcqEqvsHny+RiC7XzEolFRAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMdoFAQAHBERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxs QmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwAR BE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSP RfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQA AAoBAAIAg0UAAwAbAAALAQACAINSAAABAQAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM+U8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9u PSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCku dGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3Lncz Lm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWk+RTwvbWk+PG1pPlI8L21pPjwv bXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBl MDAyBggAAAAAAAA7= the installed capacity of on-site photovoltaics (kW); and

A× E F MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyqaiabgE na0kaadweadaWgaaWcbaGaamOraaqabaaaaa@3A92@ R0lGODlhLQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAALQAYAAACWYSPqcvtD6OctNqLcwo1+M9ZnoiEFGdOaSqh 5aaYbGuw8nKTwOzioPiLMXKnF2y2OyAfK1hNaASNoEpj9YpNPkufWhci/T6XGvC0XCSjG+r18OyO y+f0OqQAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx5QUBAAcERFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwAR BVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9F j0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9B f0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDQQACBIbXALQC AINFAAMAGwAACwEAAgCDRgAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4w Ij8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBN YXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcv MTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1pPkE8L21pPjxtbz4mI3gwMEQ3OzwvbW8+PG1zdWI+ PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtaT5GPC9taT48L21zdWI+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVu ZEA1QDVAIC0tAT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGCAAAAAAAADs=, where—
A MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyqaaaa@36BA@ R0lGODlhEAARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAARAAACH4SPqcvtGN4JUcb6rjW41b5QotOBSemd4QiI pgTHSgEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHJBQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEF VGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WP RC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/ SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINBAAAAACH/C01h dGhUeXBlMDAzwTw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1 QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1h dGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtaT5BPC9taT48 L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGAgAAAAAAADs== the floor area factor obtained from multiplying the total floor area of the building by the adjustment factor in Table 13.6.2a; and
EFMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGgbaabeaaaaa@37B5@ R0lGODlhFgAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFgAYAAACL4SPqcvtD6N8odowAT5bdj11XyRm2pWVKWeO 21UpLqJycMyOHr7qpGnzAYfEYqMAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx2gUBAAcERFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxC YXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEE TVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F 9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAA CgEAAgCDRQADABsAAAsBAAIAg0YAAAEBAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz5Tw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249 IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50 ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMu b3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT5FPC9taT48bWk+RjwvbWk+PC9t c3ViPjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUw MDIGCAAAAAAAADs== the energy factor obtained from in Table 13.6.2b.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The swimming pool pump energy usage (EP) must be determined in accordance with the following formula: E P =V× F P /1000 MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGqbaabeaakiabg2da9iaadAfaiiaacqWFxdaTcaWGgbWa aSbaaSqaaiaadcfaaeqaaOGaai4laiaaigdacaaIWaGaaGimaiaaic daaaa@4136@ R0lGODlheAAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAeAAYAAACzISPqcvtD6OctNqLs968+w+G4kiW5hOkasCt hjutasQmNZIquX03fZ/5ASU/Gm53qBUBy6EN11lapL4FVQllZq3Jz80JHH6J3K65udWZo+vnq6w1 qtvYc5o3g8jya2fXLyM392ZXSDjod1HnANjGyHB1GEe1lTgV9wjmWAWHOZlF6fiFlLQX5gknBkm6 KYlmiCqJymK5iuIm+3QK6fZKCGYKehnEJ3xXGiamjFF8QsTqzBw9PK1RW42LrQitrcPdDR4uPk5e bn6Ono5QAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMf8FAQAHBERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMA EQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEv RY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSP QX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg0UAAwAbAAAL AQACAINQAAABAQAKAgSGPQA9AgCDVgAIAgACBH/XALQCAINGAAMAGwAACwEAAgCDUAAgAAEBAAoC AIIvAAIAiDEAAgCIMAACAIgwAAIAiDAAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0i MS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRk bEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5v cmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtaT5QPC9taT48L21z dWI+PG1vPj08L21vPjxtaT5WPC9taT48bW8+JiN4MDBENzs8L21vPjxtc3ViPjxtaT5GPC9taT48 bWk+UDwvbWk+PC9tQ3N1Yj48bW8+LzwvbW8+PG1uPjEwMDA8L21uPjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEt LSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGCAAAAAAAADs=, where—

ol.li: E P MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGqbaabeaaaaa@37BF@ R0lGODlhFQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAYAAACLoSPqcvtD6NUodow8dGRA+9w4CNO35VtZpki YrWA8pdcqEqvsJnzY7fjCYfESAEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHaBQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJh c2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRN VCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0 Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAK AQACAINFAAMAGwAACwEAAgCDUAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDPlPD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0i MS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRk bEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5v cmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtaT5QPC9taT48L21z dWI+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAw MgYIAAAAAAAAOw=== the swimming pool pump energy usage; and

V MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOvaaaa@36CF@ R0lGODlhEAASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAASAAACHYSPqcvtD4I0cq6AcNPxab5RnjiCm3lCpMq2 rlsAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxyQUBAAcERFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRp bWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0Qv QVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0 EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDVgAAAAAh/wtNYXRo VHlwZTAwM8E8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1 QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRo IHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bWk+VjwvbWk+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgQAAAAAAAA7= the volume of the swimming pool to the nearest 1000 litres; and

F P MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOramaaBa aaleaacaWGqbaabeaaaaa@37C0@ R0lGODlhFAAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFAAYAAACLISPqcvtD6MEodog8dGQ08h5TzhdYkNmW8lY y4lg4vUaMFpNtr7zLg8MCh0FACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx2gUBAAcERFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNp Y0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQg RXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9Cpf SPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEA AgCDRgADABsAAAsBAAIAg1AAAAEBAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz5Tw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEu MCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxA TWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3Jn LzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT5GPC9taT48bWk+UDwvbWk+PC9tc3Vi PjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIG CAAAAAAAADs== the swimming pool pump factor as per Table 13.6.2c.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The spa pump energy usage (ES) must be determined in accordance with the following formula: E S =V× F S /100 MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGtbaabeaakiabg2da9iaadAfaiiaacqWFxdaTcaWGgbWa aSbaaSqaaiaadofaaeqaaOGaai4laiaaigdacaaIWaGaaGimaaaa@4082@ R0lGODlhbgAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAbgAYAAACv4SPqcvtD6OctNqLs968+w+G4kiCwYkGW2qw U4pCajIjp3I/NbBje175yWzAlvEw6+FsHOHF2VDymMijdXnV1KQ95TbCpR6h2Gnnu0DTqsOyeSzG uRywmFhaxcPabif57pHEt5bFoBcnyFaGZ6HCmJemSGeIeHUI2FXX9UZZeOjVaSnq9ub4aHi6KclU xEnI5pemuUpxqmMXl4vU2spji1ri8xscSlxrLKGGPFm4LNfr/DwcTV1tfY2drb3NfVEAACH/C01h dGhUeXBlMDAx/wUBAAcERFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBS b21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ 8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0 X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDRQADABsAAAsBAAIAg1MAAAEBAAoC BIY9AD0CAINWAAgCAAIEf9cAtAIAg0YAAwAbAAALAQACAINTABsAAQEACgIAgi8AAgCIMQACAIgw AAIAiDAAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlw ZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlw Ym9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhN TCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtaT5TPC9taT48L21zdWI+PG1vPj08L21vPjxtaT5W PC9taT48bW8+JiN4MDBENzs8L21vPjxtc3ViPjxtaT5GPC9taT48bWk+UzwvbWk+PC9tQnN1Yj48 bW8+LzwvbW8+PG1uPjEwMDwvbW4+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVA IC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYIAAAAAAAAOw==, where—

ol.li: E S MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGtbaabeaaaaa@37C2@ R0lGODlhFQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAYAAACLYSPqcvtD6NUodow8dGRA+9w4CNO35VtZpki 5fgl73ihBixVpryqmbULCoeSAgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMdoFAQAHBERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFz aWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1U IEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQq X0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoB AAIAg0UAAwAbAAALAQACAINTAAABAQAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM+U8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIx LjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRs QE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9y Zy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWk+RTwvbWk+PG1pPlM8L21pPjwvbXN1 Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAy BggAAAAAAAA7= the spa pump energy usage; and

V MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOvaaaa@36CF@ R0lGODlhEAASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAASAAACHYSPqcvtD4I0cq6AcNPxab5RnjiCm3lCpMq2 rlsAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxyQUBAAcERFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRp bWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0Qv QVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0 EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDVgAAAAAh/wtNYXRo VHlwZTAwM8E8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1 QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRo IHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bWk+VjwvbWk+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgQAAAAAAAA7= the volume of the spa to the nearest 100 litres; and

F S MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOramaaBa aaleaacaWGtbaabeaaaaa@37C3@ R0lGODlhFAAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFAAYAAACK4SPqcvtD6MEodog8dGQ08h5TzhdYkNmW8lg 57e456W8oN2xBl5b0w8MBgsAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHaBQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2lj Q29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBF eHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I 9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQAC AINGAAMAGwAACwEAAgCDUwAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDPlPD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4w Ij8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBN YXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcv MTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPkY8L21pPjxtaT5TPC9taT48L21zdWI+ PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYI AAAAAAAAOw=== the spa pump factor as per Table 13.6.2d.13.6.2aFloor area adjustment factor
Total floor area m2Floor area factorTotal floor area m2Floor area factorTotal floor area m2Floor area factorTotal floor area m2Floor area factor
<500.0123160–1690.0097280–2890.0087400–4090.0080
50–590.0119170–1790.0096290–2990.0086410–4190.0079
60–690.0116180–1890.0095300–3090.0085420–4290.0079
70–790.0113190–1990.0094310–3190.0085430–4390.0078
80–890.0111200–2090.0093320–3290.0084440–4490.0078
90–990.0108210–2190.0092330–3390.0083450–4590.0077
100–1090.0106220–2290.0091340–3490.0083460–4690.0077
110–1190.0105230–2390.0090350–3590.0082470–4790.0077
120–1290.0103240–2490.0090360–3690.0082480–4890.0076
130–1390.0101250–2590.0089370–3790.0081490–4990.0076
140–1490.0100260–2690.0088380–3890.00815000.0075
150–1590.0099270–2790.0087390–3990.0080——
The total floor area is measured within the inside face of the external walls of the Class 1 building and includes any conditioned, attached Class 10a building.
Where values fall between ranges given, the floor area must be rounded up to the nearest whole square metres of floor area.13.6.2bEnergy factor (EF)
Climate zoneACTNSWNTQldSATasVicWA
1——1.912.77———3.25
2—1.32—1.78————
3——1.232.46———2.87
4—1.80——1.86—1.252.34
5—1.75—2.281.79——2.35
